title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_cherry_pick
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_cherry_pick' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

sources.description: Sources to cherry-pick: SHA, `A..B` range, or branch name. Branch sources resolve to `onto..<branch>` (only commits missing from destination).

onto.description: Destination branch. Defaults to the currently checked-out branch.

deleteMergedBranches.description: After all commits apply, delete each branch-kind source locally (`git branch -d`) when it is fully merged into the destination. Protected names always skipped; never touches remote refs.

deleteMergedWorktrees.description: After success, remove any local worktree attached to a branch-kind source (`git worktree remove`). Protected tails always skipped.
